creator: jkh@time.cdrom.com
text:
> The tarball packages-2.2/x11/fvwm-1.24r.tgz on ftp.freebsd.org seems
> corrupt; it causes a "broken pipe" error with the sysinstall program,
> and when downloaded manually won't unzip.

There are about 50 corrupt packages currently on wcarchive, and
Satoshi seems to have disappeared... :-O

I'll try to get ahold of him over the next few days to correct this,
but just to note that fvwm isn't the only broken package.  I don't
know what happened to them, but they appear to have been stomped
somehow (perhaps due to an OS error of some sort on the creating or
receiving machine) - they're full of NULLs..

					Jordan
